description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the bravissimolabs/alpine-git Docker image. Define a single job named deploy-to-heroku (default stage) that runs two shell commands: `git remote add heroku https://heroku:$HEROKU_API_KEY@git.heroku.com/hello-gitlab-heroku.git` to add a Heroku remote using the HEROKU_API_KEY secret, and `git push -f heroku master` to force‑push the master branch to the Heroku app repository. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required; the job runs on every pipeline execution.
